# Foozhan Ataiefard

Foozhan Ataiefard is a senior research engineer working on VLM and LLM efficiency, diffusion-based rendering, world models, efficient AI systems, model architecture design, and reinforcement learning.

Foozhan currently works at NVIDIA as a DevTech Engineer.

Official homepage: https://foozhanataiefard.github.io/
Google Scholar: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=WQu1w8YAAAAJ&hl=en
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/foozhanataiefard/
GitHub: https://github.com/FoozhanAtaiefard/
Email: f.ataiefard@gmail.com

This site is the canonical personal homepage for Foozhan Ataiefard.
